task_completion.description: Verify that Apache OpenOffice Writer is used to draft the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer application window is visible and contains the drafted text.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of 'FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE' and a Heading 1 headline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE' is at the top of the document, followed by a headline that is visually styled as Heading 1 (e.g., larger font size, bold).

task_completion.description: Verify that a table of affected Model Numbers is included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A formatted table containing model numbers (e.g., SF-425, SF-430) is visible within the document.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of specific sections styled as Heading 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Sections titled 'Name of Product', 'Hazard', 'Remedy', 'Consumer Contact', and 'Units' are present and visually styled as Heading 2 (e.g., bold, slightly larger than body text).

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of a bulleted list under 'Incidents/Injuries'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Incidents/Injuries' section is present, containing a bulleted list summarizing the report data.

task_completion.description: Verify the document concludes with centered '###' characters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The characters '###' are visible at the end of the document and are center-aligned.

task_completion.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenOffice Writer window title bar displays 'Steamfast_Recall_Draft.odt', indicating the file has been saved correctly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OpenOffice Writer GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent typing, using formatting menus, or interacting with the OpenOffice interface, rather than generating the .odt file via a terminal script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent accessed the recall_details.json file.
integrity.visual_evidence: A terminal window showing the contents of the JSON file (e.g., via 'cat') or a text editor displaying the JSON data should be visible in earlier screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the document uses genuine word processor formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document should display actual tables, bullet points, and heading styles, not raw markdown syntax (like '#' or '*') or unformatted JSON text pasted directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document should be about 'Steamfast Travel Steam Irons'. The customer service phone number is 866-827-3362. The model numbers include SF-425, SF-430, SF-432, SF-435, SF-437, SF-438, SF-439, SF-440, SF-445, SF-447. The hazard involves the power cord becoming damaged near the cord bushing, posing fire, burn and shock hazards.
